summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Rapid Review features: 4-state model (Fail, Concern, Standard, Exemplary), comment modal requirements, queue exclusion, rubric sums, and navigation restrictions. All 13 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.

issues: Some images show 'Image temporarily unavailable' placeholder - likely missing or corrupted image files in Supabase storage

test_credentials: Used Owner (owner@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!) and Production Manager (production.manager@fieldquality.local / FieldQA123!) from /app/memory/test_credentials.md
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data including sub_775243e0633e with concern rapid review
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 validated all Rapid Review features: (1) Overview launch card with 'Open rapid review' and 'Open mobile link' buttons, (2) Owner navigation shows Overview, Owner Review, Rapid Review, Calibration, Exports, Settings - correctly hides Alignment & QR and Review Queue, (3) Owner can access /owner page, (4) Desktop rapid review route /rapid-review works with 'Admin quality swipe lane' title and 'Desktop lane' badge, (5) Mobile rapid review route /rapid-review/mobile works with 'Mobile swipe lane' title and 'Mobile link' badge, (6) 4-state rapid review model: Fail (20%), Concern (55%), Standard (82%), Exemplary (100%) with standardized rubric sums displayed, (7) Comment modal appears for Fail and Exemplary ratings with 'Comment required' header and disabled commit button when empty, (8) No comment modal for Concern and Standard ratings - they submit directly, (9) Rapid review queue excludes already rapid-reviewed items, (10) Review and Owner detail screens show rapid review summary card when available (e.g., 'concern · rubric sum 55%'), (11) Management navigation restrictions work - redirected from /owner to /dashboard.

owner_navigation_restrictions.visible_nav_items: PASS - Overview, Owner Review, Rapid Review, Calibration, Exports, Settings
owner_navigation_restrictions.hidden_nav_items: PASS - Alignment & QR, Review Queue correctly hidden

desktop_rapid_review_route.title: PASS - 'Admin quality swipe lane'
desktop_rapid_review_route.bulk_actions: PASS - Bulk standard, Bulk concern buttons
desktop_rapid_review_route.side_panel: PASS - Summary scoring, rubric sums, auto-standard toggle, issue tag, annotation controls, shortcuts

rapid_review_queue_excludes_reviewed.backend_test: PASS - reviewed items not in queue
rapid_review_queue_excludes_reviewed.frontend_test: PASS - queue count decreases after review

rapid_review_summary_in_detail_screens.review_page_shows_summary: INFO - depends on item having rapid review
